recommendations.title: The Devil's Mark
recommendations.overview: An exorcist priest meets a family that has a daughter who is pursued by a demon.
Inspired by a true story, a comedy centered on a 27-year-old guy who learns of his cancer diagnosis and his subsequent struggle to beat the disease.

recommendations.title: Burial Ground
recommendations.overview: A cursed country estate is besieged by horny houseguests, undead Etruscans, and the unusual relationship between a mother and her young son.

recommendations.title: La Jetée
recommendations.overview: A man confronts his past during an experiment that attempts to find a solution to the problems of a post-apocalyptic world caused by a world war.

recommendations.title: Letters to Santa
recommendations.overview: A romantic comedy set on Christmas Eve in Warsaw and centered around a series of characters.

recommendations.title: Electroma
recommendations.overview: Two robots embark on a quest to become human.

recommendations.title: The Traffic Policeman
recommendations.overview: An unemployed man gets a job as traffic policeman but the traffic in the big city creates innumerous problems for the poor guy.

recommendations.title: Slumber
recommendations.overview: A sleep doctor tries to protect a family from a demon that feeds on people in their nightmares.

recommendations.title: The Cleansing Hour
recommendations.overview: Two millennial entrepreneurs stage elaborate fake exorcisms on social media until one of their girlfriends becomes possessed by a demon.

recommendations.title: As Cool as I Am
recommendations.overview: A smart teenage girl comes of age in a small town with her self-centered parents who had her when they were teenagers.
